## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this needed?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs update
- [ ] CI/build change

## Validation

- [ ] `./tools/check_spdx_headers.ps1`
- [ ] Relevant `ctest` preset(s) passed
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes

## Contract Impact

- [ ] No public contract change
- [ ] Public API/behavior changed and docs updated
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] `RELEASE_LOG.md` updated (if release-facing)

## Risk Notes

- Any migration concerns?
- Any platform-specific caveats?
